case_title: WIKIMEDIA FOUNDATION INC. VS. INTERNET BRANDS, INC.

docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY DEFENDANT INTERNET BRANDS, INC.
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-19-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT INTERNET BRANDS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS PROPERLY PLED. DEFENDANT RAISES FACTUAL ISSUES THAT ARE IMPROPERLY DETERMINED ON DEMURRER. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTION TO THE REPLY IS SUSTAINED. THE REPLY IS UNTIMELY AND WAS NOT CONSIDERED BY THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2013 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Set For Trial On Aug-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT INTERNET BRANDS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled. The First Amended Complaint is properly pled. Defendant raises factual issues that are improperly determined on demurrer. Plaintiff's objection to the reply is sustained. The reply is untimely and was not considered by the Court. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-19-2012 Continued To Dec-14-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT INTERNET BRANDS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 14, 2012 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES BY WAY OF E-MAIL TO THE COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077
